title: Hotell Paradisets hemlighet
actors: Ragnar Arvedson, Anna-Lisa Baude, Anton De Verdier
plot: Henrik Schultze and his wife see no way out to pay the rent for the inn they run. a ship sinks at night and a lieutenant v Krakow to the inn with a chest of money. they murder him. For half a year, pastor Segerdahl saves them from...
